overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival game, showing a player navigating through a dark natural environment at night. The player walks through a rocky canyon, crosses a wooden bridge, explores a grassy riverbank with a lit torch, and continues along a forest path.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow rocky canyon passage in darkness

entered.detail: tall rock formation forming the left wall of the canyon
tall rock formation forming the right wall of the canyon
narrow dirt trail winding through the rocky canyon

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow rocky canyon at night, flanked by tall stone walls on both sides. The path is a dirt trail that winds through the enclosed space with minimal vegetation visible in the darkness.

events.description: exiting rocky canyon and stepping onto wooden bridge structure

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge with railings crossing over water
wooden railings on both sides of the bridge
dark water visible beneath the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the canyon onto a wooden footbridge spanning a body of water. The bridge has wooden railings on both sides and the water is visible below as the player crosses to the other side.

events.description: leaving bridge and entering open grassy wetland area beside river

agents.ego_description: walking along grassy riverbank in darkness, following the water's edge

entered.detail: open field of tall grass and wildflowers
calm water body running alongside the path
dark tree line visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the player enters an open grassland area with tall grass and wildflowers. A river runs along the left side while distant trees form a dark silhouette on the horizon under the night sky.

events.description: player equips lit torch, casting warm orange light on immediate surroundings

agents.ego_description: exploring tall grass near water while holding a lit torch with visible bloody hand

entered.detail: wooden torch with flame held in player's hand, illuminating the grass

segments.scene_description: The player pulls out a lit torch, dramatically changing the lighting as the flame illuminates the tall grass and nearby water with a warm orange glow. The bloody hand holding the torch is visible as the player continues exploring the grassy area.

events.description: transitioning from open grassland to tree-lined forest path
torch is put away, returning scene to unlit darkness

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow dirt path flanked by dense forest trees

entered.detail: narrow dirt path cutting through the forest
dense trees lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the grassland and enters a narrow dirt path winding through dense forest. The torch is put away, plunging the scene back into darkness as the player continues along the tree-lined trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic depths of a rocky canyon into an open riverbank before disappearing into a dense forest. It begins by winding through a narrow dirt trail flanked by towering stone walls, which eventually opens up as the camera crosses a wooden footbridge over a body of water. Upon reaching the other side, the scene expands into a wide grassland with wildflowers and a river, where the darkness is suddenly broken as a bloody hand raises a lit torch to cast a warm orange glow over the terrain. This illumination briefly reveals the surrounding nature before the camera turns toward a narrow dirt path, where the torch is extinguished and the environment plunges back into shadow as the player enters a thick, tree-lined forest.
